summary: Completed comprehensive visual upgrade testing of TradeLife dashboard. All 5 visual systems (Glass, Depth, Glow, Background, Panel Refinement) successfully implemented and working. Theme switching functional across all 3 themes (commercial/molten/remembrance). No layout changes, content integrity preserved.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads at /dashboard with all original content intact
Glass System: 10 glass-panel + 1 glass-panel-hero elements with backdrop blur effects
AI Core panel uses glass-panel-hero class with enhanced glow treatment
Background System: bg-ambient and bg-vignette divs present in DOM with visual effects
Top bar uses glass-topbar class with backdrop blur and semi-transparent background
Action buttons use glass-action class with hover effects (3 buttons: New Quote, New Invoice, Reports)
Inner items use glass-inset class throughout panels
Depth System: panels have proper box-shadow layering for depth perception
3-column grid layout (12-col, 3-6-3 ratio) unchanged and responsive
All data-testid attributes present and functional
Theme switching works perfectly: commercial (blue), molten (orange), remembrance (red) with different glow intensities
No particles, animations, or neon outlines present - adheres to subtle cinematic aesthetic
All content counts correct: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks, 4 stat cards
Interactive elements (buttons, navigation) all clickable and responsive
